title.en: Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review Balogun ban
title.zh-CN: 特朗普确认他要求国际足联审查Balogun禁令

summary.en: President Donald Trump confirms he asked Fifa to review United States striker Folarin Balogun's one-match suspension at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 唐纳德特朗普总统证实，他要求国际足联审查美国前锋Folarin Balogun在世界杯上一场比赛的停赛。

title.en: Starmer intervened in row over Mexico-England kick-off time
title.zh-CN: Starmer在墨西哥-英格兰开球时间进行了排队干预

summary.en: Fifa had been set to bring the match forward by six hours, due to a forecast of thunderstorms.
summary.zh-CN: 由于雷暴的预测，国际足联原定将比赛提前六个小时。

title.en: An incredible night when England heroes were made
title.zh-CN: 英格兰英雄诞生的美妙夜晚

summary.en: On a spine-tingling night of drama, emotion and pure theatre in one of sport's most atmospheric arenas, England delivered one of their greatest performances.
summary.zh-CN: 在一个充满戏剧、情感和纯粹戏剧的激动人心的夜晚，在体育界最具氛围的舞台上，英格兰表演了他们最伟大的表演之一。

title.en: Henderson expected to have surgery on injured wrist
title.zh-CN: 亨德森预计将对受伤的手腕进行手术

summary.en: Jordan Henderson is expected to have surgery on the wrist injury he sustained while celebrating England's win over Mexico on Monday.
summary.zh-CN: 乔丹·亨德森（ Jordan Henderson ）预计将在周一庆祝英格兰队战胜墨西哥队时接受手腕损伤手术。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 29
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星29号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: England win epic tie against Mexico to reach quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队赢得与墨西哥队的史诗并列，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores twice and Harry Kane converts a penalty as 10-man England beat Mexico 3-2 in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）得分两次，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在世界杯上以10人英格兰队3-2击败墨西哥队

title.en: Coach told FA Maddy Cusack was a liar, inquest hears
title.zh-CN: 教练告诉FA Maddy Cusack是个骗子，调查听到

summary.en: Jonathan Morgan says she left out detail about their relationship when speaking to her family.
summary.zh-CN: 乔纳森·摩根（ Jonathan Morgan ）说，在与家人交谈时，她忽略了有关他们关系的

title.en: Neymar says Brazil career over after Norway defeat
title.zh-CN: 内马尔表示，在挪威失利后，巴西的职业生涯结束了

summary.en: An emotional Neymar says his international career for Brazil is "over" following his side's exit at the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Norway.
summary.zh-CN: 情绪激动的内马尔表示，在他的球队在挪威手中退出2026年世界杯之后，他在巴西的国际生涯已经“结束”。

title.en: How Mexico's World Cup run brought joy after a year of fear
title.zh-CN: 墨西哥世界杯在经历了一年的恐惧后如何带来欢乐

summary.en: For Mexico's football-loving community, the World Cup has been a triumph, despite their last-16 exit. The joy has spread to Southern California, home to one of the largest Mexican communities outside...
summary.zh-CN: 对于热爱足球的墨西哥社区来说，世界杯是一次胜利，尽管他们在过去16场比赛中退出。欢乐已经蔓延到南加州，这里是外面最大的墨西哥社区之一……

title.en: 'Iconic match at iconic stadium' - England win down to 'pure will'
title.zh-CN: “标志性体育场的标志性比赛” -英格兰赢得“纯粹意志”

summary.en: England are praised for showing "heart and belief" as they beat Mexico in an "iconic match at an iconic stadium" to reach the World Cup quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队因在“标志性体育场的标志性比赛”中击败墨西哥队进入世界杯四分之一决赛而受到称赞。

title.en: Red card system in disarray over Trump, Fifa and Balogun decision
title.zh-CN: 红牌系统因特朗普、国际足联和巴洛根的决定而陷入混乱

summary.en: The decision to effectively overturn the red card shown to United States forward Folarin Balogun leaves many unanswered questions.
summary.zh-CN: 有效地推翻向美国前锋Folarin Balogun展示的红牌的决定留下了许多悬而未决的问题。

title.en: Quiz: Name every team England have played in a World Cup quarter-final
title.zh-CN: 测验：列出英格兰队参加过世界杯四分之一决赛的每一支球队
